---
title: "Contact"
title-block-style: none
description: "Contactați-ne pentru mai multe informații"
page-layout: custom
toc: false
from: markdown+raw_html
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Luați <span class="gr">Legătura</span></h1>
    <p>Întrebări, proiecte sau doar o conversație — contactați-ne la <a href="mailto:office@chen.ist">office@chen.ist</a></p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri m-contact-info">
        <div class="ci">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>
          <h3>Email</h3>
          <p><a href="mailto:office@chen.ist">office@chen.ist</a> — Întrebări generale</p>
          <p><a href="mailto:support@chen.ist">support@chen.ist</a> — Suport</p>
        </div>
        <div class="ci">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i>
          <h3>Sediu Central</h3>
          <p>Str. Filantropiei, 1-3, 200143<br>Craiova, România</p>
        </div>
        <div class="ci">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i>
          <h3>Birou Parteneri</h3>
          <p>București, România<br><a href="mailto:bucharest@chen.ist">bucharest@chen.ist</a></p>
        </div>
        <div class="ci m-social">
          <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/chenist" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a>
          <a href="https://github.com/chenist" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="m-ri m-form">
        <h2 style="text-align:left;font-size:clamp(1.5rem,3vw,2rem);margin-bottom:2rem;">Trimiteți un mesaj</h2>
        <form action="https://formspree.io/f/mpwkaqev" method="POST">
          <div class="fr">
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Nume complet *</label>
              <input type="text" name="name" required placeholder="Numele dvs. complet">
            </div>
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Email *</label>
              <input type="email" name="email" required placeholder="email@exemplu.ro">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="fr">
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Telefon</label>
              <input type="tel" name="phone" placeholder="Număr de telefon">
            </div>
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Companie</label>
              <input type="text" name="company" placeholder="Companie (opțional)">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="fg">
            <label>Interes *</label>
            <select name="interest" required>
              <option value="">Selectați...</option>
              <optgroup label="Servicii">
                <option value="digital-infrastructure">Infrastructură Digitală</option>
                <option value="cybersecurity">Securitate Cibernetică</option>
                <option value="nis2">Conformitate NIS2</option>
                <option value="cloud">Servicii Cloud</option>
              </optgroup>
              <optgroup label="Academy">
                <option value="course">Înscriere la cursuri</option>
                <option value="training">Înregistrare training</option>
                <option value="event">Eveniment / Hackathon</option>
                <option value="webinar">Webinar</option>
                <option value="summer-school">Școala de vară</option>
              </optgroup>
              <option value="general">Întrebare generală</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="fg">
            <label>Mesaj *</label>
            <textarea name="message" rows="4" required placeholder="Cum vă putem ajuta?"></textarea>
          </div>
          <input type="hidden" name="_subject" value="Contact nou de pe chen.ist">
          <input type="hidden" name="_source" value="contact-page-ro">
          <input type="text" name="_gotcha" style="display:none">
          <div class="fc">
            <input type="checkbox" required>
            <span>Sunt de acord cu <a href="/privacy.html" target="_blank">politica de confidențialitate</a> *</span>
          </div>
          <button type="submit"><i class="bi bi-send me-2"></i>Trimite mesaj</button>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Preferați o conversație<br>în direct?</h2>
    <p>Rezervați direct în calendarul nostru. 30 de minute, fără obligații.</p>
    <a href="/ro/booking/" class="m-b">Rezervă pe Cal.com</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Gratuit &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> 30 min &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> UE & Internațional
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
